temporal_description:
A medium close-up shot from the passenger side shows two men sitting in the front of a car at night. The man in the driver's seat, on the left, has a weathered face and looks down with a somber expression. The younger man in the passenger seat, on the right, looks forward with a concerned and attentive gaze. The car's interior is dark, illuminated by a soft light from outside, with the blurry lights of the city visible through the windshield. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a man speaking in a calm, conversational tone, as if making an observation. He says, "跟着你，你明星啊" (Following you, you're a celebrity, huh?). His voice is steady and even. In the background, a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score plays, creating a mood of suspense and seriousness.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a man in a dark suit and tie. He is standing in what appears to be an office or a police station, looking down at a small bottle of dark liquid he holds in his hand. To his left, a large board covered in black-and-white photographs is visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. The camera then tilts up slightly to show the man's face. He has a serious, contemplative expression as he looks down at the bottle. The background of photos is slightly out of focus.

The final shot is a medium shot of a man sitting at a desk in a dimly lit office. He is wearing a light-colored, collared shirt and has a headset on. He looks intently at something off-screen with a focused and slightly worried expression. The background is dark and filled with papers and what looks like a map or a large document pinned to the wall. The "风行网" watermark is still visible in the upper left corner. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting it might be handheld. The scene then cuts to another man speaking in a slightly more urgent and direct tone, as if confirming a piece of information, stating, "马上来了" (Coming right up). The suspenseful music continues to underscore the scene, maintaining a feeling of anticipation.
